title: Xtra Crunchy Slovakian Nectarine Skewers
description: A quick-fix Slovakian dish featuring nectarines, ferment-jang, and a citrusy twist, perfect for a diabetic-friendly snack.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together ferment-jang, lemon juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the sliced nectarines to the marinade and toss to coat, letting them sit for at least 5 minutes.
Thread the marinated nectarine wedges onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Sprinkle the toasted pumpkin seeds, chopped parsley, and chopped mint over the nectarines.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the nectarines are slightly caramelized.
Serve the Xtra Crunchy Slovakian Nectarine Skewers warm, garnished with additional parsley and mint if desired.
